Detailed Description

Author
IMD Software Team

This software is licensed under terms that can be found in the LICENSE file in the root directory of this software component. If no LICENSE file comes with this software, it is provided AS-IS.

Defines the media_error_codes symbols with every status code that can be returned by a media operation, and the media_error_t structure that pairs a code with a human-readable message.

Generated by  1.12.0
